Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

Class ClassVerifierImpl<T>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectVerifier<ClassVerifier<T>,ClassValidator<T>,Class<T>>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.ClassVerifierImpl<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the class
All Implemented Interfaces:
ClassVerifier<T>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<ClassVerifier<T>,Class<T>>
public final class ClassVerifierImpl<T> extends AbstractObjectVerifier<ClassVerifier<T>,ClassValidator<T>,Class<T>> implements ClassVerifier<T>
Default implementation of ClassVerifier.

    ClassVerifier<T>
    isSubtypeOf(Class<?> type)
    Ensures that the actual value is a subclass or sub-interface of a type.
    ClassVerifier<T>
    isSupertypeOf(Class<?> type)
    Ensures that the actual value is a superclass or super-interface of a type.
